title: Content SMP Refabricated
description: Modpack is an improved version of R4T's Content SMP, designed to enhance both gameplay and performance. It retains the core elements of the original while optimizing FPS for smoother gameplay. With better mod compatibility, refined mechanics
body:
# **Conetent SMP Refabricated!** – The Ultimate Content SMP Experience
This modpack takes R4T’s Content SMP to the next level, improving performance, stability, and overall gameplay. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, engaging in epic battles, or building your dream base, this pack ensures a seamless experience with:

✅ Optimized FPS – Performance enhancements and optimizations for smoother gameplay, even with heavy mod usage. (Server performance mods are removed due to modrinths copyright claims)

✅ Seamless Compatibility – Carefully curated mods that work together flawlessly without crashes or conflicts.

✅ Expanded Features – More progression, new mechanics, and quality-of-life improvements without unnecessary bloat.

✅ Multiplayer-Ready – Designed for SMPs with balanced gameplay, fair mechanics, and server-friendly optimizations.

✅ Improved Combat & Exploration – More weapons, tools, dungeons, and biomes to enhance both PvP and PvE experiences.

✅ Customization & Flexibility – Tweaks and settings to fine-tune gameplay to your preference.

## Support the original creators!

## 💾 Recommended RAM Allocation

[RAM Chart Single (Player)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a832d1a62b0ea36a7a699ae987361cf94dadfb62.png)

[RAM Chart (Server)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2af2b3b01f2cce768cd0d182155ef5ce7eb826cb.png)

**Tested Specs & Performance**
"I tested this modpack on a Dell laptop with an Intel Core i3-7020U, Intel HD Graphics 620, and 4GB RAM. The game ran smoothly at 60 FPS medium settings with 3GB allocated, and performed even better with 6GB allocated on a higher-end system. Additionally, I tested it on an Aternos server with 2.2GB of RAM and it ran smoothly with some sutters but was fixed with a bit of tweaking on the chunks on the server side."

This is not just another modpack it’s a fully optimized and enhanced Content SMP experience. Download now and enjoy smoother, faster, and more immersive multiplayer adventures!!!

### **Credit to the mod developers for there aswome mods!**
(All the pictures from the gallary are not mine and i do not take credit for them)
